chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D-628 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA 3151/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.11.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Najeeb Jamali, advocate for the petitioner. Messrs. Asim Iqbal and Farmanullah Khan, advocates for the respondent. The matter is pending since 2024 without any progress. At the very first date of hearing an ad-interim orders were obtained having the effect of suspending the operation of the law. Be that as it may, on the last date of hearing brief was held for petitioner’s counsel and adjournment was sought. At his request specific date was given, being today. Today once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of the petitioner’s counsel. The instant Petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
